name: noa-approval-evidence
description: The §13 Approval Evidence Bundle (noa.approval-evidence/0.1, D11-v2) + the offline `noa verify-evidence` 18-step verifier. An outcome-keyed union over a full genesis-rooted receipt chain + a reused noa.checkpoint/0.1 head anchor (F4), verified fail-closed against an EXTERNAL tenant trust root + checkpoint keyring (F7). The step-15 by-principle negative-outcome rule means NO 'nothing/cancelled/unknown' label can launder an unproven execution: without a fresh trusted checkpoint every non-executed outcome is INCONCLUSIVE. Reuses noa-receipt's verifyChain/verifyCheckpoint and noa-approval-artifacts' verifyArtifact/refHash — nothing re-implemented. Zero runtime deps beyond those two.

scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/fixtures/gen-fixtures.js && node --test dist/test/*.test.js
